productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men F 50 Style Black Shorts

The iconic three stripes on the sides and the printed logo near the right hem increases the brand appeal. The Climalite fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long by drawing sweat away from the body. Team it with vests and performance shoes for sporting activities.
